name: creativedge
description: CreativEdge local-first multi-agent desktop chatbot — root workspace orchestration (backend + frontend + electron). Phases 0 through 10 complete (Windows desktop validated, full documentation set published).

scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend && node scripts/setup-postinstall.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:backend && npm run typecheck:frontend
